      "text": "Un es dehſtiſchu tohs win-

      "text": "Ta Praweeta Amoſa Gals.

Obadijum tappe
srahdihts. Taſak-

oma: Mehſ effam weenu Sla-
u dsirdeifschi no ta KUNGA /
n Wehſtnejis irr fuhtihts ſtarp

ſfimees prett winzu Karra.
2. Redſ/ eg eſmu tewi masu
darrijs ſtarp teem Paganeem/
egi fohti nizzinahts.
3. Tawa Sirde Gresniba irr
wi peewihluſi / kas tu oſihwo

      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Kas manni nomettiſ pee Sem-
mes?
4. Jepschu tu uhszeltohs ka
Ehrglis / un jepschu tu tawu
Ligſdu ſtarp tahm Swaigsnehm
darritu/ tatschn es tewi no tur-
renes nomettischu / taffa tas
KUNGS.
5. Kad buhtu Sagli jeb Poſ-
ſtitaji pee tewis Nakti nahku-
ſchi/ ( ka effi tu ta isdeldehts?)
ne buhtu tee wosagguſcht zik
preeſch winkeein gan bija? Kad
buhtu Wihna-Pkahweji pahr te-
wi nahkuſchi/ ne buhtu tee kah-
das Wihna-Stihgas atlizzinaj-
ſchi?
6. Ka irr Eesawa(Mantas)
iſmekletas/ un winna apflehyp-
tas Leetas iſwaizatas?
7. Wiſſi tawi Derribas Bee-
dri iſdsihſ tewi pa Rohbescham
ahra / tawas Labflahschannas
Beedri tewi peewils un pahr-
warrehs/ kas tawu Maift ehſ/
tee darrihs kahdu Gewainotcbanu
appakſch tewis / Sapraſchana

tiks/ ſakka tas KUNGS? ka eg
tohs Gudrus no Eedoma/ un to
Sapraſchanu no Eesawa Kal-
neem iſnihztinaſchu?
9. Tawi Warrenee / ak Tee-
man! bailoſees/ tadeht ka ik-
weens no Eesawa Kalneem zaar
Slepkanibu tohp iſdeldehts.
10. Ta Warras-Darba deht/
ko tu tawam Brahtaim Jehka-
baim
